name: SMB Traffic Permitted From a Compromised Host
notes: This rule triggers when SMB traffic has been allowed from a host categorized as compromised.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept
when the destination port is one of the following 445
when any of Source Address are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Source Address and different Destination Address in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Source Address and different Destination Address in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY SMB Traffic Permitted From a Compromised Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept
AND when the destination port is one of the following 445
AND when any of Source Address are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Source Address and different Destination Address in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: SMB Traffic From a Compromised Host
Event description: SMB Traffic From a Compromised Host detected
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
